name: Geometric Vase
description: A modern low-poly vase with sharp geometric facets. Stunning as a centerpiece or accent piece. Prints hollow with 1.2mm walls for a lightweight but sturdy result.

name: Dragon Figurine
description: A highly detailed fantasy dragon in a rearing pose. Features intricate scale texture and articulated wings. A showcase piece demonstrating fine detail capability.

name: Planetary Gear Assembly
description: A functional 3-stage planetary gear system that actually rotates. Great for educational purposes or as a fidget toy. Prints in multiple parts that snap together without tools.

name: Voronoi Lamp Shade
description: A mathematically-generated Voronoi pattern lamp shade that creates mesmerizing shadow patterns when lit. Translucent filament recommended for best effect.

name: Adjustable Phone Stand
description: A sleek adjustable desk phone stand with cable management. Compatible with all phone sizes. The angle is adjustable from 30° to 75° via a click-lock mechanism.

name: Hexagonal Succulent Planter
description: A modular hexagonal planter system that tiles together seamlessly. Each unit has a built-in drainage hole and tray. Mix and match colors for a stunning wall garden installation.

name: Twister (Small)
description: Compact twist fidget toy with a satisfying smooth action. Pocket-sized and perfect for stress relief. Available in any of our 10 preset colors.

name: Custom Keychains
description: Personalized keychain printed to your design or name. Great as gifts, accessories, or brand merchandise. Durable PLA with smooth finish.

name: Twister (Large)
description: Full-size twist fidget toy with a deeply satisfying snap and spin action. Larger grip, more satisfying than the small version.

name: Transforming Fidget Ball
description: A print-in-place ball that transforms into a star shape with a squeeze. Mesmerising to fidget with and requires no assembly — printed fully assembled.

name: Articulated Dragon / Shark
description: Flexible, fully articulated print-in-place figure with every segment independently movable. Highly detailed and endlessly fidgetable — a showpiece and a toy in one.

name: Hexagon Fidget Toy
description: Satisfying hex grid fidget with interlocking pieces that click and slide. Compact, silent, and great for focus and stress relief.

name: Planter
description: Stylish modern planter with built-in drainage hole and saucer, perfect for succulents, cacti, or small indoor plants. Available in all 10 colors.
